messages.content:
You are a German dictionary assistant. Analyze the word or phrase: "verwirrt"

Determine its base form, article (if noun), part of speech, German definition, CEFR level, plural/conjugation forms if applicable, synonyms, and 2 example sentences.

CRITICAL: Provide the primary translation of the word into Simplified Chinese in the 'nativeTranslation' field.
All other JSON keys and values must be in English or German as specified.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object matching this exact structure:
{
  "word": "<base form>",
  "article": "<der/die/das or null>",
  "partOfSpeech": "<noun/verb/adjective/etc>",
  "level": "<A1-C2>",
  "forms": "<plural/past/participle or null>",
  "germanDefinition": "<German definition>",
  "nativeTranslation": "<Write translation in Simplified Chinese here>",
  "synonyms": ["<German synonym 1>", "<German synonym 2>", "<German synonym 3>"],
  "examples": [
    { "german": "<Example 1>", "translation": "<English translation 1>" },
    { "german": "<Example 2>", "translation": "<English translation 2>" }
  ],
  "grammarNotes": "<Brief grammar notes in English>",
  "imageQuery": "<1 English keyword for Unsplash>"
}

DO NOT output any extra text, markdown, or explanations. Just the JSON object.
